value: mlx-lm compile strategy for hybrid SSM+attention MoE models (Qwen3.6-35B-A3B): (1) NO full-model mx::compile — the model forward pass runs uncompiled. (2) Compile only small bottleneck sub-functions: gate computations with shapeless=True, SSM step with @mx.compile (pure MLX ops, fixed shapes in decode), MoE routing with @mx.compile. (3) KV cache: chunked pre-allocation (256 tokens/chunk), in-place write, but SLICE to actual filled length before passing to SDPA — so SDPA sees growing KV not the full buffer. (4) SSM step uses pure MLX ops (NOT a custom Metal kernel) so mx::compile can fuse it. Custom Metal kernel breaks compile fusion across the whole graph. Next step for Qwen3 MoE O.7: remove full-model compile, replace GatedDeltaNet custom Metal kernel with compiled pure-MLX ops (shapeless=True on a separate function), keep growing KV sliced to actual length.
